meta.note: Bioinformatics/cell biology study; many claims rest on figures (Western blots, ChIP-seq landscapes, Venn diagrams, KM curves). Several percentages read off figures; figure-derived values carry lower confidence.

claims.text: Chromatin binding densities of all five factors (H3K4ac, H3K9ac, H3K23ac, H3K27ac, BRD4) were significantly elevated in promoter regions of MCF7 cells compared to MCF10A cells.

location.quote:
the chromatin
binding densities of all five factors were significantly elevated in
promoter regions of MCF7 cells compared to MCF10A cells

claims.predicate: binding_density(MCF7) > binding_density(MCF10A) for each of H3K4ac, H3K9ac, H3K23ac, H3K27ac, BRD4 in promoter regions
claims.scope: MCF7 vs MCF10A cell lines, promoter regions, Figures 1A-E

claims.text: A substantial majority (≥78%) of BRD4 binding sites coincided with histone acetylation sites: H3K27ac (93.93%), H3K4ac (88.42%), H3K9ac (83.18%), H3K23ac (78.00%).

location.quote:
a substantial majority (≥78%) of
BRD4 binding sites coincided with histone acetylation sites, specifically H3K27ac (93.93%), H3K4ac (88.42%), H3K9ac (83.18%), and
H3K23ac (78.00%)

claims.predicate: reported_overlap_pct == 100 * (BRD4_sites_overlapping_mark / total_BRD4_sites) for each mark; all >= 78%
claims.scope: BRD4 vs histone acetylation marks, Figures 1F-J

claims.text: Co-localization events between BRD4 and histone acetylation marks were supported by correlation coefficients all exceeding 0.7.

location.quote:
These co-localization events were supported by
strong correlation coefficients, all exceeding 0.7 (Figures 1F–J)

claims.predicate: correlation_coefficient > 0.7 for all BRD4-mark pairs

a high expression level of BRD4 was significantly
associated with reduced survival probability in breast cancer
patients

claims.predicate: hazard_ratio(high vs low BRD4) reported with HR=1.61, logrank p=4.8e-05 in breast cancer OS

location.quote:
including those with the luminal subtype (Figures 2A,
B)

claims.predicate: hazard_ratio reported HR=1.35, logrank p=0.023 in luminal BRCA OS

location.quote:
elevated BRD4 expression also predicted poor

claims.text: ZBC260 was identified as the most potent BRD4 degrader among the screened panel.

location.quote: we first screened a panel of compounds and identified ZBC260 as the most potent degrader (Figure 3A)

claims.predicate: ZBC260 produces greatest BRD4 degradation among JQ1, ARV825, ZBC260

location.quote:
pre-treatment with the proteasome inhibitor
MG132 abrogated ZBC260-induced BRD4 degradation

claims.predicate: BRD4 level with MG132+ZBC260 restored relative to ZBC260 alone

claims.text: ZBC260 reduced BRD4 protein in a dose- and time-dependent manner.

location.quote:
ZBC260 also
led to a marked reduction in BRD4 protein levels in a dose- and
time-dependent manner (Figures 3C, D)

claims.predicate: BRD4 protein decreases monotonically with ZBC260 dose (0-50nM) and time (0-48h)

ZBC260 enhanced the inhibitory effect of fulvestrant to

claims.predicate: effect(Ful+ZBC260) > effect(Ful) on migration, proliferation, apoptosis; p<0.05
